jsonLd.title: Westside is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Westside! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Westside:
Westside is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
